goal: subring_subset[R](a, b) = forall(x0: R) { a.contains(x0) implies b.contains(x0) }

p.c: function[T0: Ring](x0: Subring[T0], x1: Subring[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subring_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](a, b)
subring_subset[R](a, b)
(forall(x0: R) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ b } = true)
(forall(x0: R) { not (x0 ∈ a and not x0 ∈ b) })
function(x0: R) { not (x0 ∈ a and not x0 ∈ b) }(x)
not x ∈ a or x ∈ b
exists(k0: R) { k0 ∈ a and not k0 ∈ b }
let w0: R satisfy { w0 ∈ a and not w0 ∈ b }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: lib(list).List[T0], x2: T0, x3: lib(list).List[T0]) { lib(list).List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != lib(list).List.cons[T0](x2, x3) or (x0 = x2 and x1 = x3) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: lib(list).List[T0]) { x0 = x0 and x1 = x1 } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: lib(list).List[T0]) { x0 = x0 } }

not w0 ∈ b
function(x0: R) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ b }(w0)

function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: lib(list).List[T0], x2: T0, x3: lib(list).List[T0]) { lib(list).List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != lib(list).List.cons[T0](x2, x3) or (x0 = x2 and x1 = x3) } }
function[T0] { forall(x0: T0, x1: lib(list).List[T0]) { x0 = x0 and x1 = x1 } }

function(x0: R) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ b }(w0)
function[T0: Ring](x0: Subring[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.as_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[R](a, x)
function[T0: Ring](x0: Subring[T0], x1: Subring[T0]) { not x0.as_set ⊂ x1.as_set or subring_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](a, b)
